title: What are the pros and cons of the Monday.com CRM for Real Estate Brokerages?
excerpt: Looking to transfer our CRM from Follow up Boss to Monday CRM.  Has anyone else moved over?  Pros and cons?

posts.author: StrackeRealty (Stacey Stracke)
